english:
Guurroooo! Scoundrel! Fiend! Who dares wake brave Garmond from his well needed kip?
I’ve no intent to disturb, sir bug. I am merely passing these towers and sought to better understand the lay of the place.
Hmmph! Knowing the battlefield? A warrior’s reason! Just look at you! Your stance and blade, almost alone they declare a fight.
As the bravest of knights, if direct challenge were offered, honour would see noble Garmond accept!
Fortunate that seems not your intent. In truth, I’m still sleeping off something of an altercation myself. Had our meeting called for a knightly duel, you’d not have had the luck to behold my finest form.

嘎噜！歹徒！谁敢打扰勇者加蒙德的美梦？
无意冒犯，只是路过这座塔想探探路。
哼！勘察战场？战士的借口！看你这架势就是来找架打的！
作为最勇猛的骑士，要决斗我奉陪！
算你走运，我还没睡醒。真要决斗你可打不过全盛期的我！

english:
What an awful clattering! Would you kindly conduct yourself a little more carefully?
And why are you adorned in such an awful, livid red? By my oath, those above must make a sport of sending me the most wretched servants they can find!
I am no servant, sir, rather a guest of sorts, invited by the Citadel. Tell me, is this vial of oil on display your own?
Nothing here is my own, you impertinent young mite! This sacred hall, and all the food contained within, belong to my most exalted master.
The Great Gourmand! The finest connoisseur who has ever lived, the one whose tastes transcend the ages!
None are left now who venerate them as they deserve, save for the loyal, lonely bug who stands before you.
That oil is merely a small savoury to whet their appetite for the grand meal to come. A spectacular, Pharloom spanning dish that I have been planning for an age.
But alas, those above seem to have forsaken my poor master! And I have grown so old. Now I can never hope to gather the necessary ingredients. Blast their indolence!
candidate_zh:
叮叮咣咣吵死了！能安静点吗？
还有你为什么穿这身鲜红刺眼的装扮？上面那些混蛋专派些歪瓜裂枣来侍奉我！
我可不是仆从，算是圣堡的客人。这瓶油是你的藏品？
当然不是我的，你这没耐心的小虫！这里一切都属于我尊贵的主人——大胃王！
那是空前绝后的美食家！品味超越时代的存在！
如今只剩我忠心耿耿侍奉主人，其他虫早忘了本分。
那点油不过是开胃小菜，我筹备的可是横跨纺络的盛宴！
可恨上面那帮懒鬼断了供给，我这把老骨头哪凑得齐食材！
meaning_explanation: The candidate captures the overall meaning and tone of the source, including the speaker's irritation, the contrast between servant and guest, the description of the red attire, the reference to the Great Gourmand, and the complaint about lack of ingredients. Minor omissions and slight shifts in nuance (e.g., 'clattering' simplified to 'noisy', 'livid red' to 'bright red', 'by my oath' omitted, 'impertinent young mite' changed to 'impatient little bug', 'venerate' to 'remember duty', 'savoury' to 'appetizer', 'Pharloom spanning dish' to 'feast spanning Pharloom', 'forsaken' to 'cut off supplies', 'blast their indolence' omitted) do not severely distort meaning. The translation is natural in Chinese and maintains the character's voice.
lore_explanation: The translation is generally accurate and natural, with minor issues in tone and omission of some details. No lore inconsistency since no evidence was retrieved.
style_explanation: The translation captures the tone and style well, with natural Chinese dialogue. Minor omissions and slight shifts in meaning (e.g., '歪瓜裂枣' for 'wretched servants') are acceptable for game localization. The overall readability is high.
lore_improvement_suggestion: Consider adding 'By my oath' and 'those above must make a sport of sending me the most wretched servants they can find' for fuller tone. Also, 'Pharloom spanning dish' could be more explicitly rendered as '横跨法洛姆的盛宴'.

english:
Well, well! See what happens to nasty bully-bugs when they come after poor old Grindle? That’s a well-deserved end, we reckon.
We heard this old Sitty-dell was nice and quiet and burstin’ with goodies. So what’s happened, eh? Why’s it crawlin’ with bullies and busybodies?
The creature that haunts this place is stirring, little thief. The Citadel’s caste now roam the halls. You would do well to leave soon, if you mean to survive.
What what? You bein’ mirthful? We’re stayin’ here ‘til we’re done pilfering! You should be the one leavin’ if you’re so afeared!
candidate_zh:
啧啧！瞧瞧那些欺负格林德尔恶霸虫是什么下场？真是活该！
都说圣堡既清净，宝贝又多，怎么全是打手？
掌控此地的怪物正在苏醒，圣堡的守卫四处游荡，想活命就快逃吧，小毛贼。
怕什么！起码得等偷够本再说！你要是害怕了，那就自己逃吧！

english:
Needle Child. Hakk! I encountered a settlement near here, at the core of a vein of old bells. The bugs there were snared silent on a web of Silk.
It seemed the pernicious trap of some unseen predator. I left quickly, making sure to avoid the glimmering threads.
I passed the town myself. The thread sickness, I’ve seen its like upon the roads, but there it does not discriminate.
The curse that strikes the town, it is driven, focused. A cold use of Silk at a concerning scale.
If the path permits, I will investigate its source.

使针的小姑娘！哈克！附近钟心镇被邪丝罩着，居民全中招了。
像是某种没见过的掠食者设的陷阱，我躲着丝溜走了。
我也路过了那里。路上丝咒多是个例，但那镇子上的邪丝却不挑目标。
这等规模和冷血手段，显然受到操纵。
我会顺路追查其源头。

english:
The bugs of your land, I have watched them, climbing towards their absolution without the flicker of a thought to what it means.
Aye. But isn’t it always such for those snared to serve your higher caste?
Our mortal mob did once act some defiance, unawares maybe, but successful in part, goaded towards it by Weavers’ will’n all.
You speak of the Citadel? Its former function has failed, but I can still sense its purpose, some. It is church and cage both.
Aye. Devised by your ancestors that monstrosity, and their wicked, clever minds. A system, or a web they’d likely call it, a way to keep their mother sealed in slumber, and themselves free to lavish in their false rule.

是啊，但被你们高等族群使唤的不都这样。
我们凡虫不是没反抗过。当年被织者忽悠着，居然还真成了点事。
你说圣堡？虽然荒废了，还是能感觉到它的用途：既是教堂又是牢笼。
是啊。你祖辈造的这怪物，用狡猾心思织成网，让母亲陷入沉眠，自己却在外面称王。

english:
Excellent! With two bugs at the task, the rate of discovery shall greatly increase!
Now! Before he up and vanished, my previous assistant seeded the warrens below with Plasmium buds.
The buds should be ripening as we speak and the nectar within must be extracted before they reach maturity.
With the right tool in claw, collecting the nectar is an easy process. I’ll even lend you my own Needle Phial for the job.
Once you locate a bud, simply charge the Phial until readied, then release its needle into a bud’s core. Do it right, and it’ll suck out the nectar in one clean pop!
Return them to me when you’ve retrieved the necessary samples. With the right nectar, and the right testing, Plasmium can reveal even more of its wondrous properties!

把带样本回来。有了它们做实验，生质液会更神奇！

Child Wielding Needle, your aspect is still sharp. My respect remains. Heed a warning, many fierce bugs roost nearby.

If you’re seeking a safer path, head back, towards this land’s core.

english:
Excellent! With two bugs at the task, the rate of discovery shall greatly increase!
Now! Before he went and died, my previous assistant seeded the warrens below with Plasmium buds.
The buds should be ripening as we speak and the nectar within must be extracted before they reach maturity.
With the right tool in claw, collecting the nectar is an easy process. I’ll even lend you my own Needle Phial for the job.
Once you locate a bud, simply charge the Phial until readied, then release its needle into a bud’s core. Do it right, and it’ll suck out the nectar in one clean pop!
Return them to me when you’ve retrieved the necessary samples. With the right nectar, and the right testing, Plasmium can reveal even more of its wondrous properties!

Pah, there ain’t nothin’ fine about you, jailbug. We recognised a fellow thief soon as we saw you!
Now, don’t be lingerin’ around here. Those guards’ll be wanting to pop you back in your cage quick quick!
They’ll not get the chance. I will reclaim my belongings and leave this grim place with haste.

That tribe has now long passed, and with them the secrets to their craft.

该族早已灭绝，其锻造秘技随之消逝。
